summary: Each video's report .xlsx is now emitted in Template_3_with_frames format by filling the shipped template as a skeleton from existing pipeline CSV artifacts, one row per TRIBE segment. Unit test (synthetic data, no GPU/media) and static checks pass. Real-video frame embedding + scene_description is the remaining manual/integration step.

criteria.evidence: template3_report.build_template3_workbook loads the shipped Template_3_with_frames.xlsx with openpyxl, clears example rows/images, writes one row per TRIBE segment; test asserts all 6 sheets + README + 5_WEIGHTS_REF preserved.
1_RAW_CORRELATIONS filled from decoded_terms.csv; test asserts term columns equal the template header order (visual_attention@6, reward@30) with injected r values and cleared extra rows.
3_INDEX_SCORES filled with 8 index columns + z_<IDX>; test asserts ATT matches inputs and z_ATT equals np zscore(ddof=0).
2_FRAME_MARKUP HOOK/BRAND/PRODUCT/OFFER/CTA/LOGO all written as 0 skeleton, tags blank; test asserts flags == 0.
4_WINDOW_AGGREGATES Hook 0-3/0-5/AUC/Peak/Finale (+z rows) computed from per-segment index scores; markup windows left blank; test asserts Hook/AUC/Peak numeric and BRAND window blank.

_embed_frame adds one openpyxl image per segment in the frame_image column via extract_frame_png_bytes; degrades to blank if unavailable. Verified structurally; real ffmpeg embedding requires a video (manual).
_segment_frames aligns words TSV to each segment window [offset, offset+duration] for scene_description; blank when no words TSV. Verified structurally (test runs without a words TSV -> blank).

generate_report calls write_template3_report which writes output_html.with_suffix('.xlsx') in Template_3 format and it is zipped via write_report_zip; HTML unchanged. import marketing_report + presence checks pass.
openpyxl>=3.1,<4 added to requirements.txt; Template_3_with_frames.xlsx staged in git so the clone-based runtime and loader find it.
template3_report.py starts with '# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-'; no secrets written into the workbook; UTF-8 CSV reads.

manual_followups: Run one real video end-to-end; confirm per-segment frames embed in 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS/2_FRAME_MARKUP and scene_description is populated from the hybrid transcript, and that the Template_3 xlsx is inside the report ZIP.
